introSection: Padrinos Voladores is a steel suspended family wild mouse roller coaster at Parque de Atracciones de Madrid in Madrid, Community of Madrid, Spain.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride originally opened in May 2007 as Turbulencia (Spanish for Turbulence). The official inauguration was on June 7th, 2007 even though it had been operating for some time prior. For the 2014 season, it was rethemed to The Fairly Odd Parents TV Show.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Padrinos Voladores is one of the first Zamperla Air Force models. The cars swing slightly around the corners.

fullText:
Padrinos Voladores is a steel suspended family wild mouse roller coaster at Parque de Atracciones de Madrid in Madrid, Community of Madrid, Spain.

The ride originally opened in May 2007 as Turbulencia (Spanish for Turbulence). The official inauguration was on June 7th, 2007 even though it had been operating for some time prior. For the 2014 season, it was rethemed to The Fairly Odd Parents TV Show.

Padrinos Voladores is one of the first Zamperla Air Force models. The cars swing slightly around the corners.
